channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Rubbish Near the suffolk pitch, 12th May
item.description:
Around the suffolk pitch where the garages are there is an immense amount of furniture amongst other miscellaneous items being dumped. Sometimes it is difficult to even drive through to get to the other side

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Pownall Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Litter accumulation behind Camberwell Library, 12th May
item.description:
Hello, I’m asking for the green area behind Camberwell Library to be cleaned urgently, as it’s often filthy and even more litter has recently been left there and it is continuing to accumulate. This is an important community space used by many local families, especially children visiting the library and nearby playground. It’s disappointing to see the small green area constantly covered in rubbish. Please could this be cleaned as soon as possible and maintained more regularly.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 48, Camberwell Green, Camberwell, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Flytipped window shutters, 12th May
item.description:
Dumped in Sunray Gardens a couple of days ago and now left by the main entrance opposite no 3 Elmwood Road.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Elmwood Road, Dulwich Village, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Large Unwanted Sofa Dumped on Turfed Area, 12th May
item.description:
A large unwanted sofa has been left dumped on the turfed area. Can the local team please remove it. Thank you.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Burrage Road, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Several Bags of Rubbish Dumped on Path, 12th May
item.description:
Several bags of rubbish have been left dumped on the path. Can the local team please clear them away. Thank you.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Burrage Road, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Large Amount of Unwanted Furniture Dumped on Path, 12th May
item.description:
A large amount of unwanted furniture has been left dumped on the path. Can the local team please remove it. Thank you.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Burrage Road, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Unwanted Furniture and Trolley Full of Rubbish Dumped on Path, 12th May
item.description:
Several items of unwanted furniture and a trolley full of rubbish have been left dumped on the path. Can the local team please clear them away. Thank you.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Burrage Road, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: 10 Glengall Rd, 12th May
item.description:
Loads of rubbish left outside house - there is always loads of rubbish outside this house

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Glengall Road, London
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Fly-tip Medium - Up to medium size van load

item.description:

item.title: Unwanted Mattress and Furniture Dumped by Path, 12th May
item.description:
An unwanted mattress and items of unwanted furniture have been dumped on the path. Can the local team please them. Thank you.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Maxey Road, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.description:

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Villas Road, Plumstead

item.title: Broken Office Chair Dumped in Bushes, 12th May
item.description:
A broken office chair has been left dumped in the bushes. Can the local team please remove it. Thank you.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Ann Street, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Illegal fly posting palace grove / park road junction, 12th May
item.description:
Illegal fly posting sign on lamp post on junction of palace grove and park road. Please remove.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Park Road, Plaistow, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Illegal parking, 12th May
item.description:
The vehicle is parked illegally without a valid permit. It appears to be abandoned, does not move, and regularly receives parking tickets. The vehicle is also showing as untaxed.
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Downham Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Flytipping, 12th May
item.description:
Cardboard box containing waste dumped on the pavement.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Pitman Street, Camberwell, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Pothole centre of road, 12th May
item.description:
Pothole/ bad surface near 300 old farm avenue
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 325, Old Farm Avenue, Longlands, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Flytipped office chair, 12th May
item.description:
An office chair has been flytipped on the pavement next to a litter bin.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): John Ruskin Street, Camberwell, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Missing timetables, 12th May
item.description:
The bus stop flag is missing its timetable. The display case appears to be empty or the timetable has been removed.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 295-297, Camberwell New Road, Camberwell, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Debris from car accident, 12th May
item.description:
There’s debris from a car accident today across the pavement and edge of the road
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 144, Croydon Road, Anerley, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Pallets dumped in road, 12th May
item.description:
These pallets were dumped in the road about 6 days ago and are still there. They are causing issues with traffic and need removing

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Green Lane, Eltham
Report on FixMyStreet
